assertions.title: zh-TW auto-converter uses no external library

steps.expected: The converter is self-contained and uses an in-repo mapping table instead of an external conversion library.
steps.observed: converter.ts defines SC/TC paired mapping strings, builds an internal Map, and exports convertToTraditional() without importing any external conversion package.

steps.expected: No external zh-CN→zh-TW conversion dependency is declared.
steps.observed: package.json lists dexie and phaser in dependencies plus tooling packages in devDependencies; no opencc-style dependency is present.

steps.action: Search the repo for opencc/OpenCC references
steps.expected: No application code should reference an external conversion library.
steps.observed: The only opencc/OpenCC match was in a validation document, not in app source or manifest files.

assertions.title: All locale files have matching key sets (zh-CN ⊇ en keys)

steps.action: Compare locale key sets extracted from src/i18n/locales/zh-CN.ts and src/i18n/locales/en.ts
steps.expected: Every key present in en.ts also exists in zh-CN.ts.
steps.observed: Comparison found 76 keys in zh-CN and 77 keys in en; zh-CN is missing the en key 'test.enOnly'.

steps.action: Inspect the missing key location in en.ts
steps.observed: en.ts includes 'test.enOnly' under the test-only keys section, while zh-CN.ts has no corresponding entry.

assertions.issues: zh-CN is not a superset of en because the en-only key 'test.enOnly' is missing from zh-CN.

assertions.title: t() is used consistently — no hardcoded Chinese strings remain in MenuScene

steps.action: Search src/scenes/MenuScene.ts for Han-character literals outside comments
steps.expected: No player-facing hardcoded Chinese string literals remain.
steps.observed: The grep audit returned no matches for Han characters in MenuScene.ts.

steps.action: Inspect player-facing text creation in MenuScene.ts
steps.expected: Visible text is sourced through t().
steps.observed: Menu title/subtitle, buttons, class selection, help panel, jukebox, credits, difficulty selector, and language selector all render localized strings via t(...).

assertions.title: t() is used consistently — no hardcoded Chinese strings remain in BootScene

steps.action: Search src/scenes/BootScene.ts for Han-character literals outside comments
steps.expected: No player-facing hardcoded Chinese string literals remain.
steps.observed: The grep audit returned no matches for Han characters in BootScene.ts.

steps.expected: Visible boot text is sourced through t().
steps.observed: BootScene renders t('boot.title'), t('boot.subtitle'), t('boot.loading'), and updates to t('boot.ready') on load completion.

summary: Tested 4 assertions by command inspection: 3 passed (VAL-FOUND-017, VAL-FOUND-022, VAL-FOUND-023) and 1 failed (VAL-FOUND-021, because zh-CN is missing en key test.enOnly).
